prediction.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?game ?gameLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q1060165 wdt:P1056 ?game .
  FILTER ( ?game != wd:Q7889 ) .
  ?game rdfs:label ?gameLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?gameLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?spouse WHERE {
  wd:Q22686 p:P26 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P26 ?spouse .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
}
ORDER BY ?start
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?mountain ?date WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P31 wd:Q8502 ; ?p ?statement .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER ( ?date >= "1944-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime && ?date <= "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime ) FILTER ( ?mountain = wd:Q105124 )
}
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?country ?countryLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q1969730 wdt:P527 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q3624078 .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?countryLabel ) = 'en' )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?person ?netWorth WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 ; wdt:P2218 ?netWorth .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?netWorth )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?color ?colorLabel ?fruit ?fruitLabel WHERE {
  ?color wdt:P138 ?fruit .
  ?color wdt:P31 wd:Q1075 .
  ?fruit wdt:P31 wd:Q3314483 .
  ?color rdfs:label ?colorLabel .
  ?fruit rdfs:label ?fruitLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?colorLabel ) = "en" ) .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?fruitLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel ?releaseDate WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q3772 .
  ?movie wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER ( YEAR( ?releaseDate ) = 2023 )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?painter ( COUNT( ?painting ) AS ?paintingCount ) WHERE {
  ?painter wdt:P31 wd:Q1028181 .
  ?painting wdt:P170 ?painter .
  ?painting wdt:P31 wd:Q3305213 .
}
GROUP BY ?painter
ORDER BY DESC ( ?paintingCount )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q203245 wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P27 wd:Q142 .
  wd:Q203245 wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND( YEAR( ?date ) AS ?year )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?pokemon ?pokemonLabel ?mass WHERE {
  wd:Q1191422 rdfs:label ?pokemonLabel .
  FILTER ( LANGMATCHES( LANG( ?pokemonLabel ) , 'en' ) ) .
  wd:Q1191422 wdt:P2067 ?mass .
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?species ?speciesLabel WHERE {
  ?species wdt:P171 wd:Q740335 .
  ?species wdt:P105 wd:Q7432 .
  ?species rdfs:label ?speciesLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?speciesLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?person ?netWorth WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P27 wd:Q183 ; wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 ; wdt:P2218 ?netWorth .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?netWorth )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?country ?borderCount WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P47 wd:Q117 .
  ?country wdt:P47 ?otherCountry .
  FILTER ( ?otherCountry != wd:Q117 ) .
  BIND( COUNT( ?otherCountry ) AS ?borderCount )
}
GROUP BY ?country ?borderCount
ORDER BY DESC ( ?borderCount )

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?building ?buildingLabel WHERE {
  ?building wdt:P170 wd:Q4724 .
  ?building wdt:P31 wd:Q41176 .
  ?building rdfs:label ?buildingLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?buildingLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?director1 ?director2 ( COUNT( ?film ) AS ?count ) WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  ?film wdt:P57 ?director1 .
  ?film wdt:P57 ?director2 .
  FILTER ( ?director1 < ?director2 )
}
GROUP BY ?director1 ?director2
ORDER BY DESC ( ?count )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?member ?memberLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q19771 wdt:P527 ?member .
  ?member rdfs:label ?memberLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?memberLabel ) = 'en' )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?series ( COUNT( ?game ) AS ?gameCount ) WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q7889 ; wdt:P179 ?series .
}
GROUP BY ?series
ORDER BY DESC ( ?gameCount )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?dan WHERE {
  ?dan wdt:P31 wd:Q44491547 .
  ?dan rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?label ) = 'en' ) .
  FILTER ( STRSTARTS( ?label , '9 dan' ) )
}
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?chocolateBar ?label WHERE {
  ?chocolateBar wdt:P127 wd:Q160746 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?chocolateBar rdfs:label ?label .
    FILTER ( LANG( ?label ) = 'en' )
  }
  .
  FILTER ( CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'chocolate' ) || CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'bar' ) || CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'confection' ) ) .
  FILTER ( ! CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'patent' ) ) .
  FILTER ( ! CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'process' ) ) .
  FILTER ( ! CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'ingredient' ) ) .
  FILTER ( ! CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'coating' ) ) .
  FILTER ( ! CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , 'product' ) )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?contest ?year WHERE {
  ?contest wdt:P31 wd:Q110288240 .
  ?contest wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P27 wd:Q142 .
  ?contest wdt:P585 ?year .
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?sport ?sportLabel WHERE {
  ?sport wdt:P31 wd:Q216048 .
  ?sport rdfs:label ?sportLabel
  FILTER ( CONTAINS( LCASE( ?sportLabel ) , 'hockey' ) || ?sportLabel = 'bandy' @en ) .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?sportLabel ) = 'en' )
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?species ?lifespan WHERE {
  ?species wdt:P4214 ?lifespan .
  FILTER ( isLiteral( ?lifespan ) )
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?lifespan )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?telescope ?telescopeLabel WHERE {
  ?telescope wdt:P131 ?location .
  FILTER ( ?location IN ( wd:Q298 , wd:Q419 , wd:Q750 , wd:Q414 , wd:Q2109 , wd:Q2114 , wd:Q2118 , wd:Q2120 , wd:Q2121 , wd:Q2131 , wd:Q2133 , wd:Q2166 , wd:Q2170 , wd:Q2176 , wd:Q2180 , wd:Q2182 ) ) .
  ?telescope rdfs:label ?telescopeLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?telescopeLabel ) = "en" ) .
  FILTER ( CONTAINS( LCASE( ?telescopeLabel ) , "telescope" ) || CONTAINS( LCASE( ?telescopeLabel ) , "observatory" ) )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?sauce ?sauceLabel ?city ?cityLabel WHERE {
  ?sauce wdt:P31 wd:Q178359 ; wdt:P138 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q38 .
  ?sauce rdfs:label ?sauceLabel .
  ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?sauceLabel ) = "en" ) .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?cityLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?album ?date WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P175 wd:Q569003 .
  ?album wdt:P577 ?date
}
ORDER BY ?date

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?entry wdt:P175 ?performer .
  ?performer wdt:P27 wd:Q142 .
  ?entry wdt:P1344 ?contest .
  ?contest wdt:P585 ?year .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?year )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?saint ?saintLabel WHERE {
  ?saint wdt:P411 wd:Q123110154 ; wdt:P509 wd:Q3235597 .
  ?saint rdfs:label ?saintLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?saintLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?recipient ?awardDate WHERE {
  ?recipient p:P166 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P166 wd:Q28835 .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?awardDate
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?awardDate )
LIMIT 4

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?genus ( COUNT( ?species ) AS ?speciesCount ) WHERE {
  ?species wdt:P105 wd:Q7432 ; wdt:P171 ?genus .
  ?genus wdt:P105 wd:Q34740 .
}
GROUP BY ?genus
ORDER BY DESC ( ?speciesCount )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?party ?label ?inception WHERE {
  ?party wdt:P31 wd:Q7278 .
  ?party rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER ( CONTAINS( LCASE( ?label ) , "ethiopia" ) ) .
  ?party wdt:P571 ?inception .
  FILTER ( ?inception >= "2000-01-01" ^^ xsd:date )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?particle ?particleLabel WHERE {
  ?particle wdt:P517 wd:Q11418 .
  ?particle rdfs:label ?particleLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?particleLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?movie WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P161 wd:Q41163 .
  ?movie wdt:P161 wd:Q36949 .
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?smiths_song ?original_song ?original_artist WHERE {
  ?smiths_song wdt:P175 wd:Q180598 .
  ?smiths_song wdt:P144 ?original_song .
  ?original_song wdt:P175 ?original_artist
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?film ?duration WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P57 wd:Q230448 .
  ?film wdt:P2047 ?duration .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?duration )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?civilWar ?start WHERE {
  ?civilWar wdt:P31 wd:Q8465 ; wdt:P276 | wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q18 .
  ?civilWar wdt:P580 ?start .
  FILTER ( YEAR( ?start ) >= 1801 && YEAR( ?start ) <= 1900 )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ( COUNT( DISTINCT ?country ) AS ?count ) WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q48 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q3624078 .
  ?country wdt:P35 ?headOfState .
  ?headOfState wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?smartphone WHERE {
  ?smartphone wdt:P279 wd:Q22645 .
  ?smartphone wdt:P176 ?manufacturer .
  FILTER ( ?manufacturer IN ( wd:Q160120 , wd:Q1636958 , wd:Q2084900 ) )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?person ?netWorth WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ; wdt:P2218 ?netWorth .
  FILTER ( xsd:decimal ( ?netWorth ) < 1000000000000 )
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?netWorth )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?plant ?label WHERE {
  ?plant wdt:P31 wd:Q16521 .
  ?plant rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?label ) = 'en' )
}
LIMIT 100

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?moon ?mass WHERE {
  ?moon wdt:P31 wd:Q2537 .
  ?moon wdt:P2067 ?mass .
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?mass )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?candidate WHERE {
  ?candidate wdt:P3602 ?election .
  FILTER ( ?election IN ( wd:Q30753034 , wd:Q83975602 ) ) .
  FILTER ( ?candidate != wd:Q10304982 )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?developer ?developerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q181596 wdt:P178 ?developer .
  ?developer rdfs:label ?developerLabel
  FILTER ( LANG( ?developerLabel ) = 'en' )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?crater ?location ?planet WHERE {
  wd:Q3320058 wdt:P376 ?location .
  ?location wdt:P31 ?planet .
  FILTER ( STRSTARTS( STR( ?planet ) , 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q' ) )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?podcast ?podcastLabel WHERE {
  ?podcast wdt:P31 wd:Q24634210 .
  ?podcast wdt:P1142 ?politicalIdeology .
  ?podcast rdfs:label ?podcastLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?podcastLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?company ?companyLabel WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P31 wd:Q4830453 ; wdt:P159 wd:Q59218 ; wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P17 wd:Q147 .
  FILTER ( CONTAINS( LCASE( STR( ?companyLabel ) ) , "oppo" ) )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?sauce ?city WHERE {
  ?sauce wdt:P279 * wd:Q178359 .
  ?sauce wdt:P138 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P17 wd:Q38 .
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?song ?coverArtist WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P175 wd:Q180598 .
  ?coverSong wdt:P4969 ?song .
  ?coverSong wdt:P175 ?coverArtist
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?journal ?journalLabel WHERE {
  ?publication wdt:P50 wd:Q34315853 .
  ?publication wdt:P1433 ?journal .
  ?journal rdfs:label ?journalLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?journalLabel ) = "en" )
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?country ?gdpPerCapita WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P2132 ?gdpPerCapita .
  ?country wdt:P31 ?type .
  FILTER ( ?type IN ( wd:Q3624078 , wd:Q163770 ) )
}
ORDER BY ASC ( ?gdpPerCapita )
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?player ?height ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P106 wd:Q3665646 .
  ?player wdt:P2048 ?height .
  ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER ( LANG( ?playerLabel ) = 'en' ) .
  FILTER ( ?height > 220 )
}
ORDER BY DESC ( ?height )
LIMIT 1
